title: Tile Levelling System spacers (4 mm- 5/32 inch) – 200 Clips + 100 Reusable twisters (for Tiles 3–22 mm Thick) – SHAFFER PRO tiling Tools – Tile Laying aid for Installing Floor and wall Tiles
features: ✅ [Rendered like a professional] Lay your tiles easily with this self-levelling system. The crosspieces act as spacers to keep your joints symmetrically spaced. The reusable levelling wedge (sold separately or as part of a kit) gives you adjustable height. (Maximum height 3 to 22 mm) compatible and ideal for ceramic, earthenware, floor, large or small tiles. This complete kit is an essential tool for any tiler. Whether you're a DIYer or a tiler

⏱ [ Saves considerable time and is easy to use ] Glue, slide in your spacer, lay and screw. This professional-quality accessory becomes indispensable for laying large surfaces quickly. Suitable and recommended for DIY novices

↔ [ Reduced movement while adhesive sets ] The clamp holds your earthenware/tile/ceramic while it dries (sold separately, not included in this kit). Ideal for wall mounting (credenza, bathroom etc....)
💪 [ UNIVERSAL ] can be used for both indoor and outdoor tiling, as well as for wall mounting, bathroom tiles, showers, kitchen splashbacks, porcelain tile etc.
✅ This innovative system will help you lay your tiles and guarantee a professional result with perfectly even joints.

⭐ [ INDISPENSABLE ] This is the product you need for all your building and renovation projects! Much better than classic cheap spacers, you'll get a perfect installation without advanced tiling skills.

✌️[ ADAPTED AND RECOMMENDED BY DIY NOVICES ] Simple to use, this inexpensive installation accessory will quickly become indispensable to any tiler looking for perfect alignment and fast work. [Take advantage of Amazon's 30-day money-back guarantee. ] Your satisfaction is our priority.
